---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a product, content, or platform improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Objective

Describe the outcome clearly.

## Business Reason

Explain why this matters for the company, product, collaborators, or investors.

## Proposed Direction

Describe the preferred implementation direction if one exists.

## Constraints

List constraints, dependencies, or risks.
